gpt.scientific_change: shifted the anomaly explanation from PBH-centered astrophysics toward relativistic energy misestimation in detection

manus.scientific_change: merged propagation-side and detector-side lines into one preprint-oriented framework

gemini.scientific_change: forced explicit separation of true vs reconstructed energy and sharpened the test list

codex.scientific_change: exposed weak predictive stability despite exact anchor fits

deepseek.scientific_change: identified dimension, tensor-average, and frame-definition problems that must be fixed before defense

lsc_6_2_2.scientific_change: separated isotropic trace from traceless anisotropy, removed ambiguous detector scaling, and added deterministic simulations
